name: Compare
description: Compares two inputs based on a chosen operation.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    a = inputs.get('a')
    b = inputs.get('b')
    op = inputs.get('operation', '==')
    
    self.log_info(f"Comparing {a} {op} {b}")
    
    try:
        # Attempt numeric conversion for better comparisons if applicable
        try:
            a_num = float(a) if a is not None else 0.0
            b_num = float(b) if b is not None else 0.0
            a, b = a_num, b_num
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            pass
            
        if op == '==': res = a == b
        elif op == '!=': res = a != b
        elif op == '>': res = a > b
        elif op == '<': res = a < b
        elif op == '>=': res = a >= b
        elif op == '<=': res = a <= b
        else: res = False
        
        return {'result': res}
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f"Comparison failed: {e}")
        return {'result': False}
